profile.name: Ramtin Zargari Marandi, PhD
profile.headline: Senior Data Scientist & AI Engineer | MLOps Expert | Healthcare Applications
profile.summary: Senior data scientist and AI engineer with a PhD in biomedical engineering. Over the past decade, I have contributed to designing and developing several AI systems, using genetic and clinical data, as well as implementing scalable, efficient software solutions for complex data workflows. I have extensive experience with Python, R, and cloud-based platforms, along with MLOps best practices for deploying and managing machine learning models in production.

experience.title: MLOps Engineer
experience.description: Engineered and deployed production-grade AI/ML solutions for insurance automation, including LLMs. Automated end-to-end model lifecycles using CI/CD and containerized microservices. Aligned AI development with regulatory standards, ensuring compliance, monitoring, and reproducibility. Partnered with DevOps and data teams to optimize scalability of cloud infrastructure.

experience.title: Postdoctoral Researcher, AI & Precision Medicine
experience.description: Led the design and deployment of MAIT, an open-source Python platform for reproducible medical AI. Created ExplaineR (CRAN), integrating SHAP for transparent, interpretable ML in healthcare settings. Delivered AI/ML pipelines on hybrid infrastructure (Docker, Azure DevOps, HPC), ensuring auditability and traceability. Collaborated on grant writing, stakeholder engagement, and supervised junior researchers.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description: Developed a sentiment-aware NLP platform integrated with survey tools.

experience.title: PhD Fellow
experience.description: Engineered real-time ML systems for fatigue prediction, integrating sensor streams and feedback loops. Thesis: Real-time AI-driven fatigue detection using oculometric data.

experience.title: Lecturer & Research Assistant
experience.company: Iran University of Science and Technology
experience.description: Led research on multimodal emotion detection using EEG and biosignals. Taught digital electronics and signal processing to undergraduates.

experience.title: R&D Consultant (Freelance)
experience.description: Designed and implemented tech solutions in smart infrastructure and healthcare automation.

education.thesis: Real-time AI-driven fatigue detection using oculometric data

education.focus: Eye movement signal processing for cognitive tasks

certifications.name: Fundamentals of Red Hat Enterprise Linux
